title: Remove goals layer: category replaces goal_ids across pipeline docs, schemas, server, dashboard, and hooks

tasks.title: Replace goal_ids with category in all 55 directive.json files and schema doc
tasks.scope: Update all 55 directive.json files: remove goal_ids, add category field. Update directive-json.md, morgan-plan.md, morgan-prompt.md, investigator-prompt.md schemas/templates.

dod.criterion: Zero directive.json files contain a goal_ids or goalIds field
All directive.json files have a category field with a value from {data-model, workflow-orchestration, ui, game}
directive-json.md schema references category (not goal_ids)
morgan-plan.md schema references category (not goal_folder)
morgan-prompt.md and investigator-prompt.md reference category instead of goal_folder/goal_ids

tasks.title: Move 20 completed orphan goal projects to stub directives, delete 2 junk projects, delete goals/
tasks.scope: Create stub directives for 20 orphan projects. Delete correction-to-code-pipeline and pixel-art-sprites. Delete goal copies for 22 projects with matching directives. rm -rf .context/goals/.

dod.criterion: .context/goals/ directory does not exist
Each of 20 orphan projects has a stub directive with status completed and category field
correction-to-code-pipeline and pixel-art-sprites do not exist anywhere
No project.json files were lost (count under directives >= prior count minus 2 deleted)

tasks.title: Replace all goals/ path references and goal_folder in pipeline docs, CLAUDE.md, vision.md
tasks.scope: Update 10 pipeline docs, CLAUDE.md, vision.md to replace goals/ paths with directives/ paths, goal_folder with category/directive_dir.

dod.criterion: grep -r 'goal_folder' in .claude/skills/directive/docs/ returns zero matches
grep -r 'goals/' in .claude/skills/directive/docs/ returns zero matches for path references
CLAUDE.md no longer shows goals/ in context tree, documents category enum instead of Four Goals
09-execute-projects.md uses DIRECTIVE_DIR instead of GOAL_FOLDER

tasks.title: Update validate-project-json.sh and validate-reviews.sh to remove goal_folder path support
tasks.scope: Remove goal_folder code paths from both validation scripts. Replace goal_id with category in REQUIRED_FIELDS.

dod.criterion: validate-project-json.sh has no reference to goal_folder or GOAL_FOLDER
validate-project-json.sh REQUIRED_FIELDS includes category instead of goal_id
validate-reviews.sh has no reference to goal_folder or GOAL_FOLDER
Both scripts validate correctly with {directive_dir, project_id} input

tasks.title: Delete GoalWatcher, remove goal types from server, update aggregator and index.ts
tasks.scope: Delete goal-watcher.ts. Remove GoalInventory/GoalArea/goalInventory from types. Update aggregator, index.ts, state-watcher.ts, work-item-types.ts. Add category to DirectiveRecord.

dod.criterion: server/watchers/goal-watcher.ts does not exist
grep -r 'GoalWatcher|GoalInventory|GoalArea|goalInventory|goals_updated' in server/ returns zero matches
DirectiveRecord has category field
Server compiles without type errors

tasks.title: Update dashboard store, types, and components to remove goal references
tasks.scope: Remove GoalInventory/GoalArea from dashboard types. Remove goalInventory from store. Update WebSocket hook. Update components to use category instead of goalId.

dod.criterion: grep -r 'goalInventory|GoalInventory|GoalArea|goals_updated|goalId|goalIds' in src/ returns zero matches
Dashboard compiles without type errors
ProjectsPage and DashboardPage still render without crashes
